about: Something is not working as expected

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, screenshots, or logs if relevant.

## Environment

- Version: [e.g. v1.0.0]
- Deployment: [Docker / bare metal]
- PHP version: [e.g. 8.3]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 124]
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04]

## Additional context

Any other context that might help diagnose the issue.
